recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: Blackmail
recommendations.overview: When Dev finds about his wife's affair, he starts blackmailing her and her lover but the blackmail game backfires on him.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: I Don't Want to Go Back Alone
recommendations.overview: The arrival of a new student in school changes Leonardo's life. This 15 year-old blind teenager has to deal with the jealousy of his friend Giovana while figuring out the new feelings he's having towards his new friend, Gabriel.

recommendations.title: The Hidden Blade
recommendations.overview: Set in 19th Century Japan a young samurai who finds himself in love with a farm girl leaves his home to begin a new life. He has to take stock of his new life when he is put to the test and ordered to kill a traitor who just happens to be his dearest

recommendations.title: Something New
recommendations.overview: Kenya McQueen thought she had it all: a successful career, good friends and family. There was just one thing she didn't have under control: her love life. All that changes when she meets sexy, free-spirited Brian Kelly. But when her ideal man arrives

recommendations.title: Bangla
recommendations.overview: A 22 year-old Bangladeshi-Italian Muslim boy meets a beautiful, exciting Italian girl who makes him re-analyze his beliefs and culture.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly
recommendations.overview: An old man who has one interest in life, collecting butterflies, has his life changed by an eight year old girl.

recommendations.title: You Do You
recommendations.overview: Merve chose the bohemian life, but it didn't choose her back. Faced with eviction, she starts a new job and stumbles into a spicy setup with her boss.
